display.purpose: Landing page hero and splash loader. Not used in admin views.

headline.purpose: One per admin page. The single top-level title anchoring each view.

title.purpose: Card headings, panel labels, modal titles.

body.purpose: Table content, descriptions, form field values.

label.purpose: Form labels, category chips, table column headers. Always 700 weight.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting state for all elevated surfaces. Always-on — not state-triggered.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Pointer-over state. Applied alongside -translate-y-0.5 vertical lift.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Highest elevation: active/pressed cards, modal containers.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrance animations and state transitions.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Symmetric transitions: accordion expand/collapse, drawer open/close.

motion.name: ease-card
motion.purpose: Card hover lift and button hover color shift. Snappy exit, relaxed arrival.

motion.name: fade-slide-up
motion.purpose: List item entrance staggered by index (delay: idx * 40ms).

motion.name: shimmer
motion.purpose: Skeleton loading sweep. Uses translateX(-100% → 100%) on a gradient overlay.

breakpoints.name: xs
breakpoints.purpose: Custom breakpoint for very small phones.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop layout switch: sidebar visible, multi-column grids.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Wide layout: 3-column product grid, sidebar + 2-column form split.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary CTA. Dark coal at rest, olive on hover. Pill-shaped always.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1c1d1d; color: #f0efee; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3e5219; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(62,82,25,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Outline-bordered, transparent fill. Same pill shape as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #1b1c1c; border: 1px solid #75796b; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #e9e8e7; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(62,82,25,0.4); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped display-only status indicator. Not interactive.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--neutral { background: #e9e8e7; color: #45483c; } .ds-badge--pending { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; } .ds-badge--confirmed { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; } .ds-badge--delivered { background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; } .ds-badge--cancelled { background: #ffdad6; color: #ba1a1a; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Admin product tile with image, category label, name, stock badge, and price. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
زيت زيتون

زيت زيتون بكر ممتاز

متوفر: 24 كغم12.5 د.أ
components.css: .ds-product-card { background: #fbf9f9; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #e4e2e2; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -15px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); direction: rtl; } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-product-card__image { aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: #f5f3f3; } .ds-product-card__image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 700ms ease-out; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__image img { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-product-card__body { padding: 16px 24px 24px; text-align: right; } .ds-product-card__category { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #45483c; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-product-card__name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1b1c1c; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-product-card__footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-product-card__price { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #3e5219; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Editorial underline-only field. Bottom border is the entire affordance. No box, no radius.
components.html: هذا الحقل مطلوب
components.css: .ds-field { text-align: right; } .ds-field__label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #45483c; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-field__input { display: block; width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(69,72,60,0.3); padding: 14px 4px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; color: #1b1c1c; text-align: right; outline: none; border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 200ms ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-field__input:focus { border-bottom-color: #3e5219; } .ds-field__error { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #ba1a1a; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Admin Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Active state uses background fill — no side stripe.
components.html: لوحة التحكمالمنتجات
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; direction: rtl; } .ds-nav__item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans Arabic', sans-serif; color: #45483c; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav__item:hover { background: #e9e8e7; color: #1b1c1c; } .ds-nav__item--active { background: rgba(62,82,25,0.1); color: #3e5219; } .ds-nav__icon { flex-shrink: 0; width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-nav__label { flex: 1; }

components.name: Skeleton Card
components.description: Shimmer placeholder for loading states. Uses translateX sweep on an on-surface-tinted gradient.
components.css: @keyframes ds-shimmer { from { transform: translateX(-100%); } to { transform: translateX(100%); } } .ds-skeleton { background: #e9e8e7; border-radius: 12px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-skeleton::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: translateX(-100%); animation: ds-shimmer 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(27,28,28,0.08), transparent); } .ds-skeleton-card { background: #fbf9f9; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #e4e2e2; overflow: hidden; } .ds-skeleton--image { aspect-ratio: 4/3; border-radius: 0; } .ds-skeleton-card__body { padding: 16px 24px 24px; } .ds-skeleton--label { height: 12px; width: 64px; border-radius: 9999px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-skeleton--title { height: 20px; width: 160px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-skeleton-card__footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .ds-skeleton--chip { height: 24px; width: 80px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-skeleton--price { height: 24px; width: 64px; }

narrative.overview:
A working tool built for one person: the owner of a Jordanian heritage food brand who spends their day managing products, orders, and customers. The interface carries the weight and warmth of the brand — olive green, pressed linen, earthy neutrals — without disguising itself as a dashboard. Nothing decorative. Every element earns its place.

The palette draws from the grove itself: deep grove-green for authority, pressed linen for calm, night-olive for text that reads without effort. Dark mode inverts this to a near-black olive surface with a spring-leaf primary accent, so the same heritage feeling persists after sundown. Depth comes from always-on ambient shadows — low-opacity, directional — that give each card its place in the stack without dramatic contrast.

This system explicitly rejects: cluttered dashboards that use cards as filler, aimless decorative gradients, side-stripe accents on list items, generic SaaS blue-navy palettes, and glassmorphism as decoration.
keyCharacteristics: RTL-first layout; Arabic script is a first-class typographic concern
Pill-shaped buttons and chips; gently rounded cards and panels (two radii, two purposes)
Dark-inverse CTA buttons at rest, shifting to ancient olive on hover
Underline inputs — no box border, no radius, no background fill
Ambient-always card shadows, not state-triggered elevation
Full dark-mode parity: 27 color tokens each with a defined dark-mode counterpart

rules.name: The Single Accent Rule
rules.body: Ancient Olive is the only brand color. It never fills a button at rest. It appears as hover state, active background, and focus ring. Its rarity is its power.

rules.name: The Dark Parity Rule
rules.body: Every light-mode color token has an explicitly defined dark-mode counterpart. No token is acceptable without its dark twin.

rules.name: The No-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter-spacing is prohibited on Arabic text. tracking-wide, tracking-wider, and tracking-widest break connected Arabic letterforms. Arabic text uses letter-spacing: normal without exception.

rules.name: The Ambient-Always Rule
rules.body: Shadows are properties of elevated surfaces, not responses to pointer events. A card is elevated; its shadow communicates that at rest. Hover changes the shadow level — it never creates a shadow from nothing.

rules.name: The Dark Outline Rule
rules.body: Every elevated surface in dark mode carries a 1px white-outline glow. Without it, rgba(0,0,0,X) shadows are invisible on #1a1c1a. A dark-mode shadow without the white ring is a non-shadow.

dos: Do use Ancient Olive (#3e5219) sparingly — active nav state, focus rings, hover state of the primary button. Never the resting button fill.
Do give every admin page exactly one <h2> headline, scaled text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl. One headline per view.
Do add min-w-0 to any flex child that contains text — prevents horizontal overflow in RTL layouts.
Do use transition-[transform,box-shadow] on cards and interactive surfaces. Specify exactly what changes.
Do define both light-mode and dark-mode shadow values for every shadow token.
Do use underline-only inputs for all form fields. The two-pixel bottom border is the entire affordance.
Do link every form error to its input via aria-describedby and aria-invalid='true'. Error messages must use role='alert'.
Do maintain 44px minimum touch targets on all interactive elements.
Do use pill shapes (9999px) for buttons and chips, rounded-xl/2xl (16–20px) for cards and panels.
donts: Don't use a colored left or right border (border-left / border-right > 1px) as an accent stripe on any list item, card, or nav item. Side stripes are prohibited.
Don't apply letter-spacing to Arabic text. tracking-wide, tracking-wider, and tracking-widest break connected Arabic letterforms.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (grid-template-rows, height, width, padding). Use max-height with a fixed pixel ceiling, or transform and opacity.
Don't use transition-all. Specify exact properties: transition-[transform,box-shadow].
Don't define dark-mode shadows as rgba(0,0,0,X) without a white-outline glow. Use the white-ring pattern.
Don't clutter the interface with excessive cards, decorative gradients, or aimless visual elements.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) decoratively. Reserved for dialog backdrops and image overlays only.
Don't use WhatsApp Green (#25D366) for generic success or positive states. It is a vendor color for WhatsApp actions only.
Don't use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#ffffff). Every neutral is tinted toward the olive hue.
Don't nest cards inside cards. A container holds content rows, not more containers.
